title: Alex Huang
compiled_truth: Alex Huang is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-12-13 to 2002-01-15), Alex Huang sent 34 and received 208 emails, totalling 242 interactions. Top correspondents: [Vince Kaminski](people/vince-kaminski) (23), [Vasant Shanbhogue](people/vasant-shanbhogue) (12), [Michelle Cisneros](people/michelle-cisneros) (11), [Stinson Gibner](people/stinson-gibner) (10), [Helen Zhang](people/helen-zhang) (8). Mailbox folders observed: c, inbox.
